creator: sirdice@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Oclair from comment #5)
In hindsight, yes. Pushed for the update to 5.004 without realizing the upstream author made changes that basically turned it into something that only works with MySQL 8.x. If you circumvent the check it'll produce a bunch of other build errors because the code itself only compiles in combination with MySQL 8.x and fails to build with any MariaDB version. 

Didn't notice because I was using MySQL 8.0 and the update solved some issues I was having. Completely glanced over the fact this port is also used in combination with MariaDB. 

It's all related to bug #275100
